perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands on a cruise ship deck against an ocean backdrop, wearing a white patterned tube top, denim skirt, and a sailor hat, smiling at the camera. (2) She removes her hat and runs her hand through her long dark hair while striking confident poses, looking away and then back at the lens. (3) She continues posing with the hat as the camera rapidly cuts between slightly different angles and distances of her on the deck.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic pop music begins with repetitive rhythmic vocal chops. (2) The track maintains a consistent energetic beat; no human speech is present. (3) Only the upbeat background music and very faint ambient wind noise are audible until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: "當上船看見船長時…" (When you board the ship and see the captain...) appears at the top center with a playful and flirtatious tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator posing in center frame
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white nautical-themed tube top, a short denim skirt, and a sailor's cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The deck of a large ship or cruise liner with white railings and a wooden top rail, overlooking a vast, calm blue ocean under a bright sky.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and fashion showcase designed to attract engagement through visual appeal. It uses a thematic 'captain' hook in the text overlay to contextualize the nautical outfit and cruise ship setting, while the rhythmic editing and posing emphasize the creator's physical appearance and style.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a brand pattern (Louis Vuitton) is visible, there is no explicit call to action or product focus typical of an endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form social media trend content focusing on aesthetic appeal and scenic backgrounds.
